name: Alex Chen — Recent CS Graduate
summary: Fresh computer science graduate with strong Python and web basics. Built several university projects but limited industry exposure.
resumeText:
EDUCATION
Bachelor of Science in Computer Science, State University, 2024
GPA: 3.7/4.0

SKILLS
Programming: Python, JavaScript, Java, SQL, HTML/CSS
Frameworks: React (basics), Flask
Tools: Git, VS Code, Linux
Other: Data Structures & Algorithms, Object-Oriented Programming

PROJECTS
- Built a task management web app using Flask and SQLite
- Created a weather dashboard using React and OpenWeather API
- Implemented sorting algorithm visualizer in JavaScript

COURSEWORK
Database Systems, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, Software Engineering, Machine Learning (intro)

name: Priya Sharma — Career Switcher (Marketing → Tech)
summary: Marketing professional with 3 years of experience transitioning to tech. Self-taught Python and data analysis. Strong communication and project management skills.
resumeText:
EXPERIENCE
Digital Marketing Manager, BrandFirst Agency (2021-2024)
- Managed marketing campaigns and analyzed performance data
- Used Google Analytics and SQL for customer segmentation
- Led cross-functional teams of 5-8 members
- Created dashboards in Google Data Studio

SKILLS
Technical: Python (self-taught), SQL, Google Analytics, Excel, HTML/CSS basics
Professional: Project Management, Communication, Team Leadership, Stakeholder Management, Agile/Scrum
Learning: Data Science fundamentals, Pandas, Machine Learning basics

CERTIFICATIONS
Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate, 2024

EDUCATION
BBA in Marketing, City University, 2021

name: Marcus Johnson — DevOps Junior
summary: IT support technician moving into DevOps. Comfortable with Linux and scripting, learning cloud and containerization.
resumeText:
EXPERIENCE
IT Support Technician, TechSupport Corp (2022-2024)
- Managed Linux servers and Windows workstations
- Wrote Bash scripts for system automation
- Handled network troubleshooting and DNS management
- Supported CI/CD pipeline maintenance with Jenkins

SKILLS
OS: Linux (Ubuntu, CentOS), Windows Server
Scripting: Bash, Python (basic)
Tools: Git, Jenkins (basic), Docker (learning), Nginx
Networking: TCP/IP, DNS, DHCP, VPN, firewalls

CERTIFICATIONS
CompTIA A+, CompTIA Network+

EDUCATION
Associate Degree in Information Technology, Community College, 2022

name: Sarah Kim — Frontend Developer → Full-Stack
summary: 2 years as a frontend developer, now aiming to become a full-stack engineer. Strong React skills, wants to learn backend and cloud.
resumeText:
EXPERIENCE
Frontend Developer, WebAgency Co (2022-2024)
- Built responsive SPAs using React, TypeScript, and Redux
- Implemented design systems and reusable component libraries
- Collaborated with backend team on REST API integration
- Performed code reviews and mentored interns
- Improved Lighthouse performance scores by 30%

SKILLS
Frontend: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Redux, HTML/CSS, Sass, Tailwind CSS
Tools: Git, Webpack, Vite, VS Code, Figma
Testing: Jest, React Testing Library
Other: Responsive Design, Accessibility (WCAG 2.1), Agile/Scrum

Bachelor of Arts in Design, Art University, 2020
